email.subject: Application for Java Backend Engineer at Cgi
email.body:
Hi Vaishnavi,

I came across your LinkedIn post regarding the opening for the Java Backend Engineer role at Cgi and found it closely aligned with my Java backend experience.

I have 3+ years of hands-on experience in Java Full Stack Application Development, working with technologies such as Java, Spring Boot,MicroServices, REST APIs,AWS,Databases like Mysql and Postgresql, Git and frontend frameworks.

I have hands-on experience with Spring Boot, REST APIs, and SQL-backed services. Please find my resume attached.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks & Regards,
Aryan Jaiswal

email.subject: Application for Software Engineer at Recro
email.body:
Hi there,
I came across your LinkedIn post regarding the opening for the Software Engineer role at Recro...
As a skilled Java developer with experience in AWS, Infrastructure as Code, and CI/CD, I believe I can contribute to the team's success.
Please find my resume attached...
Thanks & Regards,
Aryan Jaiswal

email_static.subject: Application for Software Engineer at Recro
email_static.body:
Hi there,

I came across your LinkedIn post regarding the opening for the Software Engineer role at Recro and found the opportunity closely aligned with my skills and experience.

I have 3+ years of hands-on experience in Java Full Stack Application Development, working with technologies such as Java, Spring Boot,MicroServices, REST APIs,AWS,Databases like Mysql and Postgresql, Git and frontend frameworks.

Please find my resume attached for your reference. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how my experience can contribute to your team.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks & Regards,
Aryan Jaiswal
